title: Create a cross-domain master data quality scan
given: The tenant has product, supplier, CRM account, warehouse, and API Hub staging data.
when: A user opens /assistant/master-data-quality and selects Create quality scan.
then: The assistant persists an AssistantMasterDataQualityRun with a quality score.
Duplicate groups, missing-field gaps, stale records, and staging conflicts are visible as evidence.
The generated enrichment plan explains that canonical master records are not overwritten automatically.

title: Queue master data cleanup for governance review
given: A quality run contains duplicate suppliers, incomplete products, stale warehouses, or API Hub mapping conflicts.
when: The data owner adds an approval note and selects Queue review.
then: An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with score and blocker counts.
The quality run moves to REVIEW_QUEUED with approvedAt and approvedByUserId populated.
No product, supplier, CRM account, warehouse, or API Hub staging row is mutated automatically.

title: Scope scans to the viewer's master-data grants
given: A user has only supplier and API Hub view grants.
when: The user opens the workspace or creates a scan.
then: The scan uses only supplier and API Hub evidence available to that viewer.
Restricted product, CRM, or warehouse records are excluded from the snapshot.
The persisted proposal remains auditable and does not expose unauthorized master data.
